description_long: This is a compact, blue urban van with a boxy shape and a slightly sloped front. The exterior features a vibrant blue paint job with stylized flame decals on the sides and a yellow checkered stripe running along the midsection, giving it a distinctive, customized look. The van has large, rectangular windows on both sides, a wide windshield, and a rear window, all of which are tinted for privacy. The wheels are small and simple, with white hubcaps, and the body shows signs of weathering and rust, suggesting frequent use. The front is equipped with two square headlights, black bumpers, and windshield wipers, while the rear has red and amber tail lights and a black bumper. The overall design suggests a utilitarian vehicle, likely used for private or small business transport in an urban environment.
description: A compact blue van with flame decals, checkered stripes, and large tinted windows, showing signs of wear and urban use. Features include square headlights, black bumpers, and simple wheels.
description_view_0: Side view showing the left profile with two large windows, flame decals, checkered stripe, and both wheels visible.
description_view_1: Rear view displaying the rear window, tail lights, black bumper, and no visible license plate.
description_view_2: Side view of the right profile, similar to the left but with mirrored decals and window arrangement.
description_view_3: Front view highlighting the wide windshield, two square headlights, black bumper, and windshield wipers.
attribute_door_configuration: two front doors, one sliding side door, two rear doors
